task_description: retrieve the latest one hundred stories from Hacker News, identify stories mentioning programming languages, generate language frequencies, and save the results to CSV
code:
import requests

url = 'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/topstories.json'
response = requests.get(url)
top_stories = response.json()[:100]

def fetch_story_details(story_id):
    url = f'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/item/{story_id}.json'
    response = requests.get(url)
    return response.json()

stories = [fetch_story_details(story_id) for story_id in top_stories]
print("Fetched details for all top 100 stories.")

trace.stdout: Fetched details for all top 100 stories.

import requests

url = 'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/topstories.json'
response = requests.get(url)
top_stories = response.json()[:100]

def fetch_story_details(story_id):
    url = f'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/item/{story_id}.json'
    response = requests.get(url)
    return response.json()

stories = [fetch_story_details(story_id) for story_id in top_stories]
print("Fetched details for all top 100 stories.")
